description: Oh — I'm sorry to step in, but Edgelord asked me to handle this one. The three Chandra-attributed cards span two sets and three artists, and they all clearly point to the same pyromancer planeswalker (Pyrohelix has IP-verified flavor speaker, Magmutt has Chandra-speaker flavor, Pyreling has Jace-Beleren-naming-Chandra flavor). It really would have been a thin set of card-to-card edges without an anchor — please, if it's not too much trouble, the character node holds it together better. I included the maternal-Pia-Nalaar / Aether-Rangers throughline because it crosses to an existing graph node and might help future bundles. Also patched Magmutt and Pyreling's missing characters: field. Hope that's all right, sir.
citations: [Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Aetherdrift Part 1, Miguel Lopez 2024-12-10]
[Pyrohelix flavor_text: Chandra Nalaar to Dovin Baan]
other_candidates_considered: Pia Nalaar character sub-node — deferred, no Pia card in corpus yet; flagged as future Nodeley trigger when a Pia Nalaar print lands (DRC-2 Pia Nalaar Chief Mechanic is the immediate candidate).
Nissa Revane partner-of-the-act character node — deferred, no Nissa card in corpus; the canonical Chandra-Nissa relationship awaits Nissa-print acquisition.

Aleksi Briclot artist node — deferred, signature-Chandra artist (original LRW Chandra Nalaar, Phoenix M12, Pyrohelix WAR), candidate when 2+ Briclot credits in corpus reach a threshold the artists-layer convention can converge on.
